free_text: Neutrons yield from thick targets bombarded with
11.5 and 23.5 MeV protons
English transl.
Li,Be,C,Mg,Al,Ti,Fe,Co,Ni,Cu,Zn,Nb,Cd,Ta,W,Pb,Bi,U
targets have natural isotopic composition and
thicknesses, equal a run of bombardment protons.
Ratio of neutrons yields Y(0 degr.)/Y(90 degr.)
from thick targets, bombardment by protons.
The total yields were obtained by integrating the areas
under the angular distribution curves, taking account
of the neutron spectra and the detector characteristics
The shape of the angular distribution in the
theta > 140. degr. region was obtained by extrapolation
.'All-Wave' BF(3) Detectors.
.No information about source of uncertainties
Table 1 of Sov.J.At.Energ.29(1970)1233
. Transformation to lower case. Some
reaction lines are corrected too.
Last checking has been done.
SD: Updated to new date formats; corrected
according to last EXFOR rules and Dict.
Ref. on translation was added. In Subents 2-19:
SF6=MLT => TTY/PY, SF8=TT deleted from REACTION
code; data from MISC, MISC-ERR moved to DATA and
DATA-ERR; MISC,MISC-ERR deleted.
Subents 20-36 were added.

and DATA-ERR; MISC,MISC-ERR deleted.
